name: Fortune Lady Calling
name_jp: フォーチュンレディ・コーリング
desc: If you control a "Fortune Lady" monster: Special Summon 1 "Fortune Lady" monster from your Deck with a different name from the cards you control, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Synchro Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Fortune Lady Calling" per turn.
eff: If you control a "Fortune Lady" monster: Special Summon 1 "Fortune Lady" monster from your Deck with a different name from the cards you control, also for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Synchro Monsters. You can only activate 1 "Fortune Lady Calling" per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
